user_goal: B029 Fundamentals Snapshot — 为 B025 us_quality_momentum 30-50 ticker backfill 10+ 年 point-in-time 财报（ROE / gross_margin / FCF Yield / debt_to_assets / PE / PB / EV/EBITDA / earnings_yield 8 ratio）。数据源 SEC EDGAR 免费自 parse XBRL（companyfacts API）。Stream 1.C / Phase 1 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第四个 batch)。**不做** strategy 代码切真财务（留 B030）/ Master ETF / ADR proxy fundamentals (本批次仅 B025 universe) / 每日 EOD cron / forecast。本批次 4 features：(F001) SEC EDGAR client + XBRL parser + 8 ratio 计算 + FundamentalsLoader 抽象 + User-Agent 含 contact email + rate limit 10/sec；(F002) Backfill driver + storage 双层 data/snapshots/fundamentals/{sec_edgar,unified}/ + universe_us_quality 与 B025 fixture 一致 + ticker_to_cik 映射 + 本机跑通 30-50 ticker + PIT validation 报告；(F003) PIT load_fundamentals(tickers, as_of) effective_date=report_date+1 business day + B025 既有回测 deterministic 不变；(F004) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.29 + 新增 (h)(i)(j)：** (h) SEC EDGAR User-Agent 必含 contact email + (i) rate limit 严格 10 req/sec (SEC hard limit；超 ban 30 天) + (j) Ratio 计算公式锁定 strategy doc §6 (永久不擅改)。决策矩阵（2026-05-26 用户已批）：数据源=SEC EDGAR 免费自 parse XBRL / 范围=仅 B025 us_quality 30-50 ticker 10+ 年财报 / Schema=与 B025 fixture 11 列严格一致 / 拆分=4 features (与 B028 一致)。受益 v0.9.27 §12.7.1 paths-trigger 已修：本批次改 trade/+workbench_api/+scripts/ 自然触 CI/Deploy 不需 dispatch 兜底。B026 banner 仍 enable 不破。F001+F002+F003 generator，F004 codex。预估 1-2 个中等批次。

session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 B029 F002 完成（feat commit 11270ff + fix-round 1 commit 9187445）。F002 实施 3 scripts + 1 测试 + sec_edgar_loader 方法拆 + 概念 alias chain + 真 SEC backfill + PIT validation 报告。详细：(a) scripts/universe_us_quality.py — B025 30-ticker universe (27 real + 3 synthetic ZQAI/ZQPT/ZQLH) + assert_consistent_with_fixture 守门。(b) scripts/ticker_to_cik.py — 默认读 F001 fixture；--rebuild 路径 fetch SEC company_tickers.json 重写 fixture (atomic write + 保 _doc + synthetic 保 null)。(c) scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py — argparse driver；per-ticker fetch_raw_companyfacts (sec_edgar_loader 新增方法返 raw SEC dict 不走 parse)；raw_companyfacts_to_parsed_ratios 走 SEC_CONCEPT_NAMES alias chain (每 ratio input list of SEC concept names；按顺序聚合 entries 后 bucket by calendar quarter；缺 concept skip quarter 记原因) + SHARES_OUTSTANDING_ALIASES 多 namespace fallback；_nearest_close 从 B028 prices_daily.csv 查 close(report_date) ±5d；compute_ebitda + 8 compute_* (公式锁定 §6/§4.4)；write_vendor_artifacts 写 data/snapshots/fundamentals/sec_edgar/<CIK:010d>/{companyfacts.json,parsed_ratios.json,metadata.json}；merge_into_unified 写 data/snapshots/fundamentals/unified/fundamentals.csv (sort + dedupe (ticker,fq) + atomic)；synthetic ticker catch ValueError + log warn + skip 不阻塞 (裁决 #3)。(d) workbench_api/data/sec_edgar_loader.py 拆 fetch_quarterly_fundamentals 为 fetch_raw_companyfacts + parse_companyfacts (saved fixture path)；F001 测试 16/16 仍过。(e) data/snapshots/.gitignore 扩 *.json 同 CSV 'regenerate, don't commit' 语义。(f) DUK CIK 0000017797 已 retired → 1326160 (Duke Energy Corporation 2006 重组后 holding co) fixture 修复。(g) tests/unit/test_backfill_fundamentals.py 20 用例 (universe/ticker_to_cik/UNIFIED_COLUMNS 12 列/calendar_quarter/bucketing latest-filed/nearest_close/raw_to_parsed_ratios AAPL 数值匹配/缺 concept skip/无 prices skip/driver mock 全流程/synthetic skip 不 fetch/PIT 不变量/dedupe (ticker,fq)/atomic write/参数化 quarter_end 4 cases)。(h) 本机跑真 SEC backfill: 4 次迭代 — 第一次 248 行因 SEC concept 单一映射；加 alias chain 后 334；加 SalesRevenueGoodsNet + 多 shares concept 后 685；最后扩 OperatingExpenses 后 685 (饱和)。 6/27 ticker (BAC/JPM/V/LIN/NEE/PLD) 产 0 行因 sector-structural 概念不匹配 (银行/支付无 COGS/Capex/D&A；REIT 用 RentalIncome 而非 Revenues；utility 单线 OpEx)；21/27 真 ticker 产 1-59 行 (UNH 最佳 59；HON 57；PG 57；DUK 56 — 用 holding-co CIK 后产数据；JNJ 55 — 用 IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxes... alias 后产数据)；总 685 < spec ≥1000 floor，但 PIT spot-check 25/25 PASS；F003 fall back B025 fixture 保 backtest 确定性。(i) PIT validation 报告 docs/test-reports/B029-pit-validation-2026-05-26.md 全节: backfill 摘要 + 25/25 PIT PASS 表 + 6 ticker sector 限制说明 + B030 cutover per-sector ratio model 路径 + 21 ticker per-row breakdown + quarterly accounting 简化说明 (cumulative-to-date for flow, point-in-time for balance, no TTM)。(j) Gates 全绿: backend pytest 341→361 +20 (vs spec ≥326 +35 buffer) / ruff 0 / mypy 0 (143 source files) / frontend vitest 166 不动。(k) 下一 sprint F003: trade/data/loader.py 加 load_fundamentals(tickers, as_of_date) PIT enforcement (effective_date = report_date + 1 business day) + 读 data/snapshots/fundamentals/unified if exists else fall back B025 fixture；pytest ≥10 (≥336 floor)；B025 既有回测 deterministic 不变是硬要求。Boundary: B025 fixture 0 字节改；strategy 代码 0 改；B026 banner / production deploy / pyproject / alembic 不动。
session_notes._generator_f001: 2026-05-26 B029 F001 完成（commit b338c39；7 新文件 + 4 改文件 + 37 新测试）。预先走 pre-impl 审计（commit 7cfde22 → Planner 裁决 c07867f 全 A），开工无歧义。实施：(a) workbench_api/data/fundamentals_loader.py — FundamentalsRow 12 字段（report_date,ticker,fiscal_quarter='2014Q4',fiscal_quarter_end,roe,gross_margin,fcf_yield,debt_to_assets,pe,pb,ev_ebitda,earnings_yield；frozen+slots；与 B025 fixture 列序 1:1）+ FundamentalsLoader abstract base（fetch_quarterly_fundamentals + health_check 两 abstractmethod）。(b) workbench_api/data/sec_edgar_loader.py — SECEDGARFundamentalsLoader 继承 FundamentalsLoader；走 https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK{cik:010d}.json（pre-parsed JSON 不需 XML 解析）；User-Agent header 'Workbench Trade research-only <email>' 来自 SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL（永久边界 (h) 缺时 RuntimeError 含 GitHub repo secret 修复指引 + SEC 政策链接 + ban IP 警示）；SimpleRateLimit(10, period_sec=1.0) 滑动窗口限速器（永久边界 (i)；monotonic+sleep injectable for test）；httpx.Client 30s timeout；Protocol-based DI for httpx _HttpClient / _Limiter 让 stub 不需继承 httpx；3 次重试 + 指数 backoff 0.5/1.0/2.0/4.0/8.0s cap；403 → _AuthFailure；429/5xx 重试；ticker→null CIK ValueError含 'skip in backfill driver' 指针（裁决决议 #3 F002 catch 用）；_load_default_ticker_cik_map 读 fixture（skip _doc prefix 键）；parse_companyfacts 校验 parsed_ratios 块 12 必填字段；report_date 过滤；SEC_CONCEPT_NAMES dict pin 11 us-gaap concept aliases 供 F002 backfill driver 用。(c) workbench_api/data/xbrl_parser.py — 8 ratio compute_ 函数 + compute_ebitda helper；公式严格按 strategy doc §6 + spec §4.4 锁定（永久边界 (j)）：roe=NI/SE / gross_margin=(Rev-COGS)/Rev / fcf_yield=(CFO-Capex)/MC / debt_to_assets=LTD/A / pe=MC/NI_TTM / pb=MC/SE / ev_ebitda=(MC+LTD-Cash)/EBITDA / earnings_yield=NI_TTM/MC / ebitda=OI+D&A；零分母 raise ValueError 含 ratio 名 + denominator 名 context（防 silent inf/nan slip 到 unified CSV）。(d) 3 fixtures：ticker_cik_map.json 30 ticker (27 真 CIK + ZQAI/ZQPT/ZQLH=null) / aapl_companyfacts.json 4 quarter parsed_ratios block (2014Q4-2015Q3 数值取自 B025 fixture authoritative) / nvda_companyfacts.json 同样 4 quarter；fixture shape 含 _doc inline 文档 + cik + entityName + parsed_ratios list；真实 SEC companyfacts payload 不含 parsed_ratios，F002 driver 合成此 block 后 pass 给 parse_companyfacts。(e) settings.py SEC_EDGAR_CONTACT_EMAIL 加 ALLOWED_ENV_VARS + typed field（v0.9.25 §12.5 模式）+ EXPECTED_ALLOWLIST 同步 + deploy.sh pre-flight check exit 67 if missing。(f) 37 测试用例覆盖：抽象 instantiation TypeError / 12 字段 schema 列序 / frozen+slots / fiscal_quarter '2014Q4' 格式 / 8 ratio AAPL 2014Q4 fixture 数值匹配（hand-computed numbers）/ 零分母 parametrize 7 + ev_ebitda 1 / 缺 contact email RuntimeError / env 读取 / UA header 含 email / 30 ticker 含 3 synthetic null / synthetic ValueError 含 skip 指针 / 4 quarter AAPL parse / report_date range filter / 5xx 3 次重试 sleep [0.5,1.0] / 429 重试 / 403 → False / 200 → True 含 AAPL submissions URL / SimpleRateLimit 注入 itertools.count clock + sleeps 列表断言 11 次调用触发 1 次 sleep ≥0.4 / SimpleRateLimit 构造 args 校验 / parse_companyfacts 缺 parsed_ratios ValueError 含 AAPL / missing report_date ValueError 含 2014Q4 / SEC_CONCEPT_NAMES 8 ratio 输入覆盖。(g) Gates 全绿：backend pytest 341 passed 2 skipped (B028 baseline 304 → +37；spec F001 ≥12 floor 远超 + ≥316 整体 floor ✓) / ruff 0 / mypy 0 (142 source files) / frontend vitest 166 (baseline 不破)。(h) Boundary: pyproject.toml 不动（裁决决议 #4 不引入新 dep；stdlib json + 既有 httpx 已够；companyfacts JSON 路径不需 lxml）/ CRITICAL_RUNTIME_DEPS 不动 / B027/B028 既有 tiingo_loader/yfinance_loader/cost_guard/snapshot_loader 0 改 / B025 fixture 0 字节改 / strategy 代码 0 改 / B026 banner / production deploy 不动 / alembic 不动。(i) push origin main 触 Workbench Backend + Frontend CI（paths-trigger 已修；不需 dispatch）。(j) 下一 sprint F002: scripts/backfill_fundamentals.py argparse driver + scripts/universe_us_quality.py 30 ticker 与 B025 fixture 一致 + scripts/ticker_to_cik.py one-shot CIK 查表 + 本机跑 27 真 ticker × 40 quarter backfill 入 data/snapshots/fundamentals/{sec_edgar,unified}/ ≥1000 rows + PIT validation 报告
